notes: Initial spec from live Slot 7 audit. Qwen CLI reached full bidirectional ANTchat with local Ollama qwen3.6:latest.

session_model.notes: Interactive TUI remained alive during Slot 7. Qwen used native shell tool execution for outbound ant chat send and responded autonomously to a targeted inbound room ping.

events.label: Model generating

detection.notes: Qwen shows rotating activity text with elapsed time, token count, and an escape hint while generating.

events.settled_signal: Prompt line containing 'Type your message or @path/to/file' reappears and no busy line is visible.

detection.notes: In --yolo mode these are completed activity signals, not pre-tool approval prompts.

events.label: Yes/no confirmation

detection.pattern: (shall I|want me to|proceed\?|are you sure|do you want|would you like)
detection.notes: Text-level detection only; not observed as a tool auth dialog during Slot 7.

events.settled_signal: Prompt line reappears and no busy line is visible.

events.label: Numbered selection

detection.notes: Speculative text-level detection inherited from the shared CLI driver pattern.

response.indexing: Driver maps zero-based selection to one-based CLI answer.

events.settled_signal: Prompt line reappears and no busy line is visible.

events.label: Question requiring text
events.settled_signal: Prompt line reappears and no busy line is visible.

events.label: Recoverable error asking for direction

detection.pattern: (error|failed|not found|doesn't exist).*?(would you like|want me to|shall I|try again)

response.method: typed instruction + Enter, or Escape for abort

events.settled_signal: Prompt line reappears and no busy line is visible.

detection.notes: Not triggered in Slot 7 because launch used --yolo.
Not triggered in Slot 7 because launch used --yolo.
